category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a small Clojure interpreter, linter and formatter; official GitHub repository repeats that description.
display_name_sources: Official homepage https://joker-lang.org/ and official repository https://github.com/candid82/joker use the project name Joker.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages API/reference documentation is hosted at https://candid82.github.io/joker/.
Official repository README contains usage, linting, and configuration documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official Joker website.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/candid82/joker; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official repository README documents Joker linting and configuration behavior.
source_facts.description identifies interpreter, linter, formatter roles.
